Predictor variable names for the dataset plantae

Source: R/plantae.R
plantae_predictors.Rd

Character vector of 84 predictor variable names from plantae.

Usage

data(plantae_predictors)

Format

A character vector of length 84.

See also

Other plantae: plantae, plantae_east, plantae_extra(), plantae_responses, plantae_west

Examples

data(plantae_predictors)
plantae_predictors
#>  [1] "bias_log_records"              "geo_neighbors_count"          
#>  [3] "geo_neighbors_area_km2"        "geo_neighbors_aridity_mean"   
#>  [5] "geo_area_km2"                  "geo_polygons_count"           
#>  [7] "geo_perimeter_km"              "geo_shared_perimeter_km"      
#>  [9] "geo_shared_perimeter_fraction" "geo_distance_to_ocean"        
#> [11] "geo_elevation_mean"            "human_population"             
#> [13] "human_population_density"      "human_footprint_mean"         
#> [15] "climate_velocity_lgm_mean"     "climate_hypervolume"          
#> [17] "landcover_bare_percent_mean"   "landcover_herbs_percent_mean" 
#> [19] "landcover_trees_percent_mean"  "fragmentation_ai"             
#> [21] "fragmentation_area_mn"         "fragmentation_ca"             
#> [23] "fragmentation_clumpy"          "fragmentation_cohesion"       
#> [25] "fragmentation_contig_mn"       "fragmentation_core_mn"        
#> [27] "fragmentation_cpland"          "fragmentation_dcore_mn"       
#> [29] "fragmentation_division"        "fragmentation_ed"             
#> [31] "fragmentation_lsi"             "fragmentation_mesh"           
#> [33] "fragmentation_ndca"            "fragmentation_nlsi"           
#> [35] "fragmentation_np"              "fragmentation_shape_mn"       
#> [37] "fragmentation_tca"             "fragmentation_te"             
#> [39] "air_humidity_max"              "air_humidity_mean"            
#> [41] "air_humidity_min"              "air_humidity_range"           
#> [43] "aridity_mean"                  "cloud_cover_max"              
#> [45] "cloud_cover_mean"              "cloud_cover_min"              
#> [47] "cloud_cover_range"             "evapotranspiration_max"       
#> [49] "evapotranspiration_mean"       "evapotranspiration_min"       
#> [51] "evapotranspiration_range"      "precipitation_seasonality"    
#> [53] "precipitation_total"           "precipitation_coldest_quarter"
#> [55] "precipitation_driest_month"    "precipitation_driest_quarter" 
#> [57] "precipitation_warmest_quarter" "precipitation_wettest_month"  
#> [59] "precipitation_wettest_quarter" "temperature_isothermality"    
#> [61] "temperature_mean_daily_range"  "temperature_mean"             
#> [63] "temperature_range"             "temperature_seasonality"      
#> [65] "temperature_coldest_month"     "temperature_coldest_quarter"  
#> [67] "temperature_driest_quarter"    "temperature_warmest_month"    
#> [69] "temperature_warmest_quarter"   "temperature_wettest_quarter"  
#> [71] "soil_clay"                     "soil_nitrogen"                
#> [73] "soil_organic_carbon"           "soil_ph"                      
#> [75] "soil_sand"                     "soil_silt"                    
#> [77] "soil_temperature_max"          "soil_temperature_mean"        
#> [79] "soil_temperature_min"          "soil_temperature_range"       
#> [81] "ndvi_max"                      "ndvi_mean"                    
#> [83] "ndvi_min"                      "ndvi_range"
